violations.description: COOKING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): Potentially hazardous food noted not being adequately reheated. Food items observed such as soups sauces and other hot held food items are not being reheated within the alloted amount of time.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of cheese and chicken wings was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the prep top coolers and the prep line upright cooler.

EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food contact items with contaminated hands. Observed employee wipe face with paper towel rinse food off of dirty dishes and then procceded to unload clean dishes without proper handwashing between dirty to clean tasks.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of shredded/crumbled cheese in rear 2 door upright and sauces/salsas in the walk in cooler was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided for quat sanitizer.
